Summary: Model started write_file JSON for main.py and file_manager.py but truncated before closing braces on passes 1 and 2; pass 3 returned empty response; zero project files written across all 3 passes.
Q8 variant (4b-q8_0) was tested and failed long write_file generation. The base 4b (Q4) variant uses lower precision and is expected to perform the same or worse for long-payload tool calls.

Produces 3-4 task plans with non-empty descriptions. Custom Modelfile with temperature=0.2, think=false, 16K context cap, few-shot examples baked in. QAT wrapper — not a LoRA-trained adapter. Phase 3 LoRA training remains blocked at 0/150 examples.
NotRecommendedUses: raw use without Modelfile (planning collapse observed on base gemma4:12b)

Summary: Excellent coder and researcher in swarm worker role. Not recommended as boss without tuning — observed planning collapse: outputs title='Execute goal', description='' when asked to decompose tasks. Use theorc-boss:gemma4 (tuned Modelfile) for boss role.
NotRecommendedUses: boss role without Modelfile tuning (planning collapse)

Summary: Google official QAT GGUF, 6.7 GB. Same base as theorc-boss:gemma4 but without boss-planning Modelfile calibration. Good coder and researcher. Not recommended as boss without tuning (same planning collapse as plain gemma4:12b).
